title: Bump harness-schemas v0.1.0 → v0.2.0 adding sessionSchemaRefs + deploymentSchemaRefs
description: Promote session/deployment schema references from ad-hoc identity.extensions to first-class optional fields on HarnessAspectDoc. Design locked: two parallel optional fields. Add to schema-universal/private/universal/domain/system/schema-families/harness-schemas/v0.2.0/spm/harness-schemas-v000-002-000/Sources/HarnessSchemas_v000_002_000/HarnessModel.swift: `public var sessionSchemaRefs: [SchemaFamilyRef]?` (for session-hosting harnesses) and `public var deploymentSchemaRefs: [SchemaFamilyRef]?` (for factory/mint carriers like digikoma). Update HarnessSchemaVersion.current = "0.2.0". Add SchemaFamilyRef struct if not already present (family: String, version: String). Mirror v0.1.0 directory wholesale, find/replace v000_001 → v000_002 in module name + Package.swift, bump schemaVersion constant, author migrator under schema-migrators/. Then update core-entity-set freshness audit binding to harness-schemas v0.2.0.
resolutionNote: Landed: harness-schemas v0.2.0 published at schema-universal/private/universal/domain/system/schema-families/harness-schemas/v0.2.0/spm/harness-schemas-v000-002-000/. Module renamed Harness_Schemas_v000_002_000. Added: SchemaFamilyRef struct (family + version, Codable+Sendable+Equatable), HarnessModel.sessionSchemaRefs: [SchemaFamilyRef]? and deploymentSchemaRefs: [SchemaFamilyRef]? as optional additive fields, HarnessSchemaVersion.current bumped to 0.2.0. CodingKeys + custom decoder updated, optional-decodeIfPresent so new fields default to nil. 9 tests pass: schemaVersionConstantIs0_2_0, sessionAndDeploymentRefsDefaultToNil, roundTripWithSessionSchemaRefs (pi-session-schemas v0.1.0), roundTripWithDeploymentSchemaRefs (digikoma-deployment-schemas v0.2.0), roundTripWithBothRefs, decodeRejectsWrongSchemaVersion, decodeWithoutOptionalRefsBehavesLikeV010, emptyRuntimeKindsRejected, schemaFamilyRefEquality. Sanity migrator (v0.1.0→v0.2.0) deferred to separate bead `harness-schemas-v0.1.0-to-v0.2.0-sanity-migrator` since the bump alone is the load-bearing artifact and migrator is descriptor-level work.
